meta.sourceLabel: World Bank Indicators API + Our World in Data + UNDP Human Development Reports + IMF DataMapper + WHO Global Health Observatory
notes: World Bank values are the latest non-null annual value returned by the Indicators API.
UNDP HDR fields are merged when an HDR CSV URL is supplied or discoverable; otherwise legacy HDI/IHDI values remain marked as legacy.

popDensity.unit: people per square kilometre of land area

poverty.unit: percent of population below $2.15/day at 2017 PPP

energyUse.unit: kg of oil equivalent per person

imfGdpGrowth.unit: annual percent (latest available or IMF projection)

imfInflation.unit: annual percent (latest available or IMF projection)

imfUnemployment.unit: annual percent (latest available or IMF projection)

imfDebtGdp.unit: percent of GDP (latest available or IMF projection)
